inputs.label: Number of Conditions (k)
inputs.businessContext: Number of repeated measurement levels or conditions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of repeated measurement levels or conditions.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tekrarlanan ölçüm seviyelerinin veya koşullarının sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der wiederholten Messstufen oder Bedingungen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de niveaux de mesure répétés ou conditions.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de niveles o condiciones de medición repetidas.
businessContext_i18n.ar: عدد مستويات القياس أو الشروط المتكررة.

inputs.label: SS Condition
inputs.businessContext: Sum of squares due to the within-subjects factor (condition).

businessContext_i18n.en: Sum of squares due to the within-subjects factor (condition).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Denek içi faktörden (koşul) kaynaklanan kareler toplamı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Summe der Quadrate aufgrund des Innersubjektfaktors (Bedingung).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Somme des carrés due au facteur intra-sujet (condition).
businessContext_i18n.es: Suma de cuadrados debida al factor intrasujetos (condición).

inputs.label: SS Error
inputs.businessContext: Sum of squares error (residual) for the within-subjects factor.

businessContext_i18n.en: Sum of squares error (residual) for the within-subjects factor.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Denek içi faktör için kareler toplamı hatası (artık).
businessContext_i18n.de: Summe der Quadrate des Fehlers (Residuum) für den Innersubjektfaktor.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Somme des carrés de l'erreur (résiduelle) pour le facteur intra-sujet.
businessContext_i18n.es: Suma de cuadrados del error (residual) para el factor intrasujetos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: مجموع مربعات الخطأ (المتبقي) للعامل داخل الأشخاص.
